content.text:
{"success":true,"response":"The process with process_rule_id `J09C` has been executed end-to-end:

- Temporary working tables were created and populated from `decision_table` for TOURS starting with `J09C`.
- `ENTSCHEIDUNG` was computed per the rules (per-HAUS EQUNR count, plus override for `HOUSE_NUM1 = 0`).
- Data was joined with `EABLG`, `NET_MASTER`, and `SALES_MASTER`.
- For each EQUNR, sales data was preferred where available; otherwise, net data was used.
- The final dataset (143,736 rows) was exported to `J09C.csv` with exactly the requested columns.
- The CSV was emailed to `meter.readings@evu.com`.
- All temporary tables (`J09C_temp`, `J09C_step4`, `J09C_step5_net`, `J09C_step5_sales`, `J09C_step6`) were dropped.

If you want, I can also generate a sample (e.g., first 20 rows) of the final result for review.","message":"Process agent executed successfully","hit_recursion_limit":false,"hit_timeout":false}

structured_content.response:
The process with process_rule_id `J09C` has been executed end-to-end:

- Temporary working tables were created and populated from `decision_table` for TOURS starting with `J09C`.
- `ENTSCHEIDUNG` was computed per the rules (per-HAUS EQUNR count, plus override for `HOUSE_NUM1 = 0`).
- Data was joined with `EABLG`, `NET_MASTER`, and `SALES_MASTER`.
- For each EQUNR, sales data was preferred where available; otherwise, net data was used.
- The final dataset (143,736 rows) was exported to `J09C.csv` with exactly the requested columns.
- The CSV was emailed to `meter.readings@evu.com`.
- All temporary tables (`J09C_temp`, `J09C_step4`, `J09C_step5_net`, `J09C_step5_sales`, `J09C_step6`) were dropped.

If you want, I can also generate a sample (e.g., first 20 rows) of the final result for review.

kwargs.content:
The process with process_rule_id `J09C` has been executed successfully end-to-end. Summary of what was done:

- Temporary working tables were created and populated from `decision_table` for TOURS starting with `J09C`.
- `ENTSCHEIDUNG` was computed according to the defined rules (per-HAUS EQUNR count, plus override where `HOUSE_NUM1 = 0`).
- Data was joined with `EABLG`, `NET_MASTER`, and `SALES_MASTER`.
- For each EQUNR, sales data was used where available; otherwise, net data was used.
- The final dataset (143,736 rows) was exported to `J09C.csv` with the requested columns.
- The CSV was emailed to `meter.readings@evu.com`.
- All temporary tables (`J09C_temp`, `J09C_step4`, `J09C_step5_net`, `J09C_step5_sales`, `J09C_step6`) were dropped.

If you want to validate the result, I can ask the process agent to produce a sample of the output (for example, the first 20 rows) or a schema/column listing.
